cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a partner at the start. The partners are: Alice with Helga, Bob with Jamie, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Karl, and Eve with Rodrigo. Now we need to track the partner switches. Let me list all the steps. First, Eve and Bob switch partners. Let me note down the initial partners: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Jamie - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Karl - Eve: Rodrigo After Eve and Bob switch partners: - Bob will now be with Rodrigo (Eve's former partner) - Eve will now be with Jamie (Bob's former partner) So now: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire:
